{{Expand}}

{{Infobox territory
| name = Incarnation of a warrior
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Valin]] has an [[Incarnation of a warrior]] [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16">''City of Light'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Territories]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
